description_text: New Carbon Fibre Rear Bumper Shark Fin Diffuser Give your Car a Stylish Sporty look with this high quality Universal Rear Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Spoiler. This Item will fit most of the car. Please Check measurements prior to buying. This shark fin diffuser designed to increase a vehicle's aerodynamic performance. Made of high quality imported ABS material, wear resistent and durable, UV‑protected and weatherproof. Reduces car's drag about 1.6% and increases down force, enhance the vehicle stability. Universal car modified parts, highly suitable for the body, reliable to use. Carbon fibre style and stylish shark fin designed, it's also a decoration for your vehicles. Item Type: Rear Bumper Diffuser Material: ABS Color: Black Carbon Fiber Style Application: Universal Size: Approx. 86.3 x 15.2cm/34 x 6in
